","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/capture/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/capture/README.md","text":"# Capture A generic inbox plugin for TiddlyWiki. Stream-based quick capture with triage to typed entities. ## Features - **Inbox stream** — rapid keyboard-driven capture via the streams plugin - **Triage view** — review captures, promote to typed entities - **Configurable** — set which stream tiddler serves as inbox - **Generic** — works with any typed model ## Requirements - TiddlyWiki 5.3.0+ - [Streams plugin](https://saqimtiaz.github.io/streams/) by Saqimtiaz - [Typed plugin](https://github.com/rimir-cc/tw-typed) by rimir ## License MIT ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/changelog","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog |!Version |!Date |!Changes | |v0.1.0 |2026-03-23 |Initial release: inbox view, triage view, configurable inbox stream | "},"$:/config/rimir/capture/inbox-stream":{"title":"$:/config/rimir/capture/inbox-stream","text":"Inbox"},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/documentation","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/capture/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/capture/doc/overview"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. See the [[readme|$:/plugins/rimir/capture/readme]] tab for a basic overview. <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/icon":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/icon","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","type":"image/svg+xml","text":" "},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/inbox-view":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/inbox-view","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/appify/view","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$let inboxTitle={{{ [{$:/config/rimir/capture/inbox-stream}] ~[[Inbox]] }}}> <%if [is[tiddler]] %> <$tiddler tiddler=<>> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/sq/streams/nodes-list-template" $mode="block"/> <%else%>
No inbox stream found. <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" style="margin-left:8px;"> <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-new-tiddler" title=<> stream-type="default" type="text/vnd.tiddlywiki"/> Create ''<>'' stream
<%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/readme","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Capture A generic inbox plugin for quick idea capture using streams. Throw in thoughts, ideas, and fleeting notes — then triage them into structured typed entities when ready. !! Features * **Inbox stream** — rapid keyboard-driven capture via the streams plugin * **Triage view** — review captures, promote to typed entities (task, meeting, etc.) * **Configurable** — set which stream tiddler serves as inbox * **Generic** — works with any typed model, not tied to a specific domain !! Prerequisites * [[Streams plugin|$:/plugins/sq/streams]] for stream-based note entry * [[Typed plugin|$:/plugins/rimir/typed]] for promoting captures to structured entities !! Quick start # Open the inbox view and start typing — entries are saved as stream nodes # When ready to triage, switch to the triage view # Click "Promote" on a capture to open the typed spawner with text pre-filled "},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/settings","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"
!! Inbox stream The title of the stream tiddler used as inbox for quick capture. <$edit-text tiddler="$:/config/rimir/capture/inbox-stream" class="rr-input" tag="input" default="Inbox"/>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/styles","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".cap-triage-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .cap-triage-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid <>; border-radius: 6px; background: <>; } .cap-triage-text { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .cap-triage-meta { flex-shrink: 0; } .cap-triage-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } "},"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/triage-view":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/capture/triage-view","created":"20260323120000000","modified":"20260323120000000","tags":"$:/tags/rimir/appify/view","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\procedure cap-promote-actions() <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/typed/spawner/prefill-text" text={{{ [get[text]] }}}/> <$action-navigate $to="$:/plugins/rimir/typed/spawner"/> \end <$let inboxTitle={{{ [{$:/config/rimir/capture/inbox-stream}] ~[[Inbox]] }}}> !! Triage inbox <$let nodes={{{ [get[stream-list]enlist-input[]] }}}> <%if [!is[blank]] %>
<$list filter="[get[stream-list]enlist-input[]]" variable="node">
<$text text={{{ [get[text]splitregexp[\n]first[]] }}}/>
<$view tiddler=<> field="created" format="date" template="YYYY-0MM-0DD 0hh:0mm"/>
<$button class="rr-link-btn" tooltip="Open typed spawner with this text"> <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/rimir/typed/spawner/prefill-text" text={{{ [get[text]] }}}/> <$action-navigate $to="$:/plugins/rimir/typed/spawner"/> promote <$button class="rr-link-btn" tooltip="Open in story river"> <$action-navigate $to=<>/> open
<%else%>
Inbox is empty.
<%endif%> "}}}
